title: Stop Claude from forgetting anything
summary: Hermes is a tool that provides Claude with persistent memory across projects and sessions. It maintains a unified memory store and builds a skill library over time, eliminating the need to re-explain context for each new project.
writeup: The video introduces Hermes, a tool that gives Claude persistent memory across separate projects and sessions. It maintains a unified memory store and accumulates a skill library over time, so context does not have to be re-explained for each new project. The takeaway is a practical approach to context management: a single shared memory plus a growing set of reusable skills addresses the problem of Claude forgetting prior work between sessions.
